/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/server.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/game/combat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/game/enemy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/game/player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/game/world.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/map/map.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/map/pathfinding.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/network/packet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/network/server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/network/session.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/utils/logger.cpp.o -o server
